data.body: terminal-manager.ts: remove OpenRouterSessionRuntime import and `if (agent.kind === 'openrouter')` branch, remove OPENROUTER_API_KEY env injection. orchestration-manager.ts and breakdown-manager.ts: change fallback command from 'openrouter-agent' to 'claude'. local-worker.ts: replace 'openrouter-agent' with 'opencode' in BLOCKED_SHELL_COMMANDS.
data.title: Remove OpenRouter from runtime and execution
